reviews.review_description:
Flight Deck offers a surprisingly immersive way to practice cockpit procedures at home. The full-scale Cessna 172 cockpit is detailed, interactive and works very well with hand tracking.

While it's not a flight simulator, it excels at helping build familiarity and muscle memory for cockpit flows. A great tool for student pilots, aviation enthusiasts and anyone interested in learning aircraft procedures in VR.

The app delivers and does what it says or does. I used this on a Quest 2 and had to switch from controllers to hand gestures to close the tutorial video. Not a deal breaker, especially for something in early release. Would recommend to anyone who needs chair flying hours for the 172.

The visuals are distorted and difficult to read when not highlighted.

It was bought as a “sim” and not as a practical checklist.

Very disappointing
Easy to use app, more fun for procedure practice than a cockpit poster
